title: GrowGenie - AI Business Builder
description: An AI-powered business platform for Indian SMEs featuring roadmap generation, subscription plans, multilingual content, and PDF invoice generation.

title: SeminarHub - Event Management System
description: A full-stack seminar management system with Spring Boot REST backend and dynamic HTML/CSS/JS frontend for scheduling and managing events.

title: SecureAuth - JWT Authentication Service
description: A backend authentication microservice with BCrypt password hashing, JWT token management, and role-based access control.

title: DataSync - JDBC Batch Processor
description: A Java application demonstrating advanced JDBC operations including batch inserts, stored procedures, and transaction control for large-scale data handling.

title: DevFolio - Developer Portfolio
description: A personal portfolio website with a macOS-inspired UI, draggable windows, Spotify player, resume viewer and project showcase — built with React and Tailwind CSS.
